supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on third-party vendors, cloud service providers, and technology infrastructure providers for operational systems and platforms
risks: Operational failure or disruption at third-party service providers, cyber attacks on vendors, supply chain attacks affecting software and IT service providers, concentration risk with common service providers

Third-party risk including vendor risk, information security and cybersecurity risks from third parties, business resilience risk from disruption to critical processes, increased operational risks from reliance on technology and third-party relationships

regulatory_risks: Municipal securities regulations including political contribution rules
Supplementary Leverage Ratio (SLR) requirements
ESG disclosure requirements (CSRD, CSDDD in EU)
MiFID II and MiFIR regulations in EU and UK
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and UK Bribery Act
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) regulations on credit card account management practices
Insider trading regulations
Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) requirements
TLAC (Total Loss-Absorbing Capacity) requirements
SEC regulations on broker-dealers and investment advisers
Compensation practices oversight by FRB and other regulators
Proposed Basel III Revisions and FRTB implementation
Prompt corrective action framework for depository institutions
Net Stable Funding Ratio (NSFR) requirements
UK Financial Conduct Authority and Prudential Regulation Authority regulations
Capital requirements under Basel III and Capital Framework regulations
Compliance with Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act
Securities offering and underwriting regulations
Stress Capital Buffer (SCB) requirements
NYDFS cybersecurity requirements
Climate-related financial risk management guidance
SEC and CFTC regulations for swap dealers and security-based swap dealers
Transaction and regulatory reporting requirements
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) oversight of consumer activities
Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) requirements
Global Systemically Important Bank (G-SIB) surcharge requirements
FDIC regulations and deposit insurance requirements
New York State Department of Financial Services regulations
Basel III capital and liquidity requirements
Volcker Rule compliance
Data privacy regulations including EU regulations
OECD Pillar II minimum tax (15% global minimum tax)
Short sale rules compliance
State-level fair access statutes and ESG-related regulations
Anti-money laundering regulations
Sanctions compliance (US, EU, UK)
Dodd-Frank Act compliance and restrictions on proprietary trading (Volcker Rule)
Federal Reserve System regulations for bank holding companies
Comprehensive Capital Analysis and Review (CCAR) stress testing
Communications recordkeeping and recording requirements
Resolution planning requirements (living wills)
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance
GDPR and data privacy regulations (EU, UK, California)
Anti-money laundering (AML) and Bank Secrecy Act (BSA) compliance
CFTC regulations on swaps and derivatives
European Central Bank, BaFin and Deutsche Bundesbank regulations
Sanctions compliance requirements

sanction_risks: Russia sanctions exposure following invasion of Ukraine
Potential large-scale sale of US Treasury securities by foreign governments
Risk of delisting or removal of securities from exchanges due to geopolitical tensions
Sanctions compliance requirements in various jurisdictions
Potential impact of sanctions on counterparties and transactions
Russia sanctions exposure due to Ukraine conflict
Restrictions on cross-border trade, investment, or technology transfer
US-China trade tensions and potential tariffs
